post.description:
Import transactions from a bank export (CSV or XLSX).

Duplicate transactions (by dedup hash) are automatically skipped.

avg_cost_per_unit.description: Average cost per unit in minor units (cents).

cost_basis.title: Cost Basis
cost_basis.description: Total cost basis in minor units (cents).

current_price.title: Current Price
current_price.description: Latest price per unit in minor units, or null if no price recorded.

current_value.title: Current Value
current_value.description: Current value in minor units, or null if no price recorded.

gain_loss.title: Gain Loss
gain_loss.description: Unrealized gain/loss in minor units, or null if no price.

gain_loss_pct.title: Gain Loss Pct
gain_loss_pct.description: Unrealized gain/loss percentage, or null if no price or zero cost.
